mapper.select: SELECT * FROM blogger WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_weight DESC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM blogger WHERE category = #{category} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_weight DESC
SELECT * FROM blogger WHERE is_recommended = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_weight DESC
SELECT * FROM blogger WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blogger (nickname, avatar, bio, source_platform, platform_url, category, follower_count, is_recommended, sort_weight) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{bio}, #{sourcePlatform}, #{platformUrl}, #{category}, #{followerCount}, #{isRecommended}, #{sortWeight})
mapper.update: UPDATE blogger SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
